Sprint-3c hotfix opened as DRAFT PR #117. Real party test revealed 3 critical bugs (#113 discussion timer stuck, #114 host-role investigate confused with migration, #115 vote glitch+recursive audio). Subagent root-caused all three as one shared cascade: Supabase presence retrack fires leave for OLD state → my prior 17b6a26 fix only filtered self-leaves so peers were unprotected → grace window fires 30s later → selectNextHost runs non-deterministically per client (joinedAt differs) → wrong peer flips isHost → closure-captured listeners enter host branch → self-echo loop → vote mount stampede + audio recursion. Fix: presence:leave now reads channel.presenceState() and ignores leaves where the key is still in state (retrack artifact). Also fixed latent isHost-stripping in gameState projections. 3 of 4 peers now reach day-discuss cleanly in the hardened test. 1 remaining bug (#116): dead Host-role investigator stays stuck on night screen, never routes to spectator. Draft PR opened — Sahil decides whether to merge partial fix or continue iterating. Hardened multi-client test with mount counters is the permanent regression gate going forward.
